title: Crunchy German Stir-Fry
description: A simple and flavorful German-inspired stir-fry with a crunchy twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the savory stir-fry mix and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the crunchy chopped onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the German-style sauerkraut and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the maple syrup and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the maple syrup mixture over the stir-fry and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Optional: add more crunchy toppings such as chopped nuts or seeds.
